1792020.name: Hop Hop Delivery!
1792020.description:
HOP HOP DELIVERY is your little delivery company! Your goal is to find and deliver animals and objects of all types, through crazy, creative and deformable levels, using different types of vehicles impacted by physics!

GAME MODES:

SINGLE PLAYER:
You play alone, offline through all levels. The objective is to make your deliveries within the allowed time, without dropping them!

MULTIPLAYER:
Two to four players casually compete to find and deliver animals and items!

LEVEL EDITOR MODE:
The game editor allows players to create and share their own levels in a fun and user-friendly interface.
1792020.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
